name: Proc Filesystem Credential Access on Linux
description: Detects credential access via /proc/*/maps and /proc/*/mem on Linux to extract credentials from running processes. Covers MimiPenguin, LaZagne, gdb attach, gcore, and manual /proc reads.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("/proc/*/mem", "/proc/*/maps", "*mimipenguin*", "*LaZagne*") or (process.name == "gdb" and process.args : "attach") or process.name == "gcore")
